params.name: Apollo Lunar Module
params.description:
On Jan 21, 1967 AD, the Apollo Lunar Module was officially completed in the US.
The Apollo Lunar Module was the spacecraft used by NASA during the Apollo moon missions. It consisted of two parts: the Command Module, responsible for navigation and life support, and the Lunar Module, used for landing on and returning from the moon. The Apollo Lunar Module played a crucial role in humanity's first successful moon landing, marking an extraordinary achievement in human space exploration.
